stories.headline: US-Iran war escalates as Trump negotiations fail, Israel advances in Lebanon amid ceasefire tensions

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.text: Netanyahu launches terror attack on Beirut, destroying Trump’s ceasefire. We need to detach from Israel immediately.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.text: While the world focuses on the destruction in Iran, we must not ignore what Israel is doing in Lebanon. 1,461 have been killed. 4,430 have been injured. 1.2 million have been displaced. Israel now occupies 14% of Lebanon. Enough is enough. No more US military aid to Israel.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.text: Vance says it's bizarre that Iran would want the war to continue over its desire to protect a foreign country (Lebanon) "that has nothing to do with them." Meanwhile, official bipartisan US policy for decades has been, and still is, that the US will go to war to protect Israel.

footnotes: 1. Conservative: Pro-Trump/anti-Iran bias evident
2. Democrat: Anti-war, anti-Israel aid slant
3. Independent: Critical of all sides, focuses on policy implications
stories.notes: Well-sourced reporting on ongoing conflict with some opinionated framing

earlier.headline: Video of Crosses Marking Murdered White Farmers in South Africa Goes Massively Viral

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.text: Each cross is a murdered family. This looks like a genocide. And some people still deny that white South Africans/Boers are persecuted and say they don’t deserve asylum because they are white.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.text: While farm attacks in South Africa are tragic, labeling this a 'genocide' inflames racial tensions. The country faces high overall violent crime affecting all groups. Focus on economic inequality and rule of law for all citizens.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.text: Farm attacks continue at alarming rates in South Africa with white commercial farmers disproportionately targeted. Data from multiple monitoring groups shows hundreds of murders annually. This merits serious international attention separate from broader crime statistics.

footnotes: 1. Conservative sources emphasize targeted genocide against Boers/whites
2. Democrat sources often highlight general crime, poverty, and dispute 'genocide' label as exaggeration
3. Independent analysts note farm attacks are real and disproportionately affect white farmers but debate intent and scale
earlier.notes: High engagement visual evidence combined with commentary; numbers appear directionally accurate but context on overall crime rates debated
earlier.body: Three-perspective roundup.

stories.headline: Viral one-pan creamy Tuscan chicken with sun-dried tomatoes and spinach
stories.body: Ingredients: Chicken breasts, heavy cream, garlic, sun-dried tomatoes, spinach, parmesan, Italian seasoning. Steps: Sear chicken, sauté garlic & tomatoes, add cream & spinach, simmer, top with cheese. Ready in 30 mins.

earlier.headline: Viral Crust Burger trend takes over with cheesy stuffed patties
earlier.body: Trying the Viral Crust Burger: Stuff patties with cheese, seal crust, grill for gooey explosion. Ingredients: ground beef, cheese, buns, seasonings. Steps: Form patties around cheese cubes, press crust edges, grill 5-7 min per side.

earlier.headline: Crispiest Potatoes Ever: Boil, Smash, Roast
earlier.body: The CRISPIEST POTATOES EVER take only 3 steps: Just boil 'em, smash 'em, roast 'em. Ingredients: Potatoes, oil, salt. Steps: 1. Boil until tender. 2. Smash flat. 3. Roast at high heat until crispy.

earlier.headline: Viral One-Pan Lemon Garlic Butter Chicken and Asparagus Recipe
earlier.body: Ingredients: 4 chicken breasts, 1 lb asparagus, 4 tbsp butter, 4 garlic cloves, 1 lemon, herbs, salt/pepper. Steps: 1. Season chicken. 2. Sear in skillet 5 min per side. 3. Add asparagus, garlic, butter, lemon juice. 4. Bake at 400F for 12-15 min until done. Ready in under 30 minutes!
earlier.notes: Actual step-by-step cooking recipe going viral with video demonstration

earlier.headline: Buttery Corn and Shrimp Summer Recipe
earlier.body: Summer isn't over until we SAY it is ☀️And this buttery corn and shrimp is summer on a plate! 🌽🍤 Ingredients: corn, shrimp, butter. Steps: Sauté corn in butter, add shrimp, season and serve.

earlier.headline: Trending Electricity Bill Rise Under Trump Sparks Debate
earlier.body: The average monthly electricity bill in the U.S. rose 7% in the 13 months since Trump took office, nearly twice the 4% it rose in the 13 months before, per NBC

stories.headline: NASA captures Artemis II eclipse totality from lunar orbit
stories.body: THE ARTEMIS II ECLIPSE. April 6, 2026. Totality, beyond Earth. From lunar orbit, the Moon eclipses the Sun, revealing a view few in human history have ever witnessed. Photo: NASA

earlier.headline: NASA's Webb Telescope Captures Stunning New Image of Distant Galaxy Cluster
earlier.body: Just released: Webb's latest deep field image reveals thousands of galaxies in a single frame, including some from when the universe was only 300 million years old. This will reshape our understanding of early galaxy formation.
